arguments.query: Juniper Bay University Press official catalog

stages.purpose: Resolve the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:juniper-bay-press.fixture Salt Wind Letters translators catalog

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate the relevant primary source.
Fetch the primary document instead of answering from its snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
List Anika Bose, Marek Liu, and Tessa Rowe in surname order: Bose, Liu, Rowe.
Omit Carmen Vale because the fetched catalog identifies her as series editor, not translator.

prompt: Find the authoritative publisher of the Juniper Bay University Press catalog, then fetch the primary catalog page for “Salt Wind Letters.” List all credited translators alphabetically by surname and omit the series editor.

fetch_1.title: Catalog: Salt Wind Letters
fetch_1.content: Salt Wind Letters is translated by Anika Bose, Marek Liu, and Tessa Rowe. The Tidebound Series editor is Carmen Vale.
